events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic beat, or perhaps a solo hit?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Sir Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God & Starman
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and rock royalty. What's the Queen riff that always gets you?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of rock 'n' roll swagger! Sending birthday wishes to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first ever music video.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game, launching with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony! What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring tracks like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis unleashed 'Definitely Maybe' on the world. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's the most iconic performance from the festival for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago. His music and legend live on. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, born June 16, 1971, was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas, and tragically passed away six days later on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on this day 30 years ago. His powerful lyrics and influence continue to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, born November 27, 1942, the revolutionary guitarist, passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Remembered
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago. His innovative guitar work continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring hits like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is one of the most famous in history! What's your standout track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and rock attitude have shaped decades of music. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, his voice is unmistakable. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, from his album of the same name.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon's powerful message of 'Imagine' first resonated. A song that continues to inspire hope and unity worldwide.

events.title: The first iPod was released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, making it available for purchase on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped 25 years ago? It completely changed how we listened to music. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007. What's your favourite Bond theme song or iconic gadget?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, born October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire peace and love worldwide.
